rcomplex 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Comparative co-expression analysis with rcomplex

Test clique intensity against a permutation null

Source: R/cliques.R
clique_intensity_test.Rd

Permutes the ortholog mapping and builds a null distribution of clique intensity. The null model shuffles Species2 genes globally across all HOGs (not within-HOG), destroying the specific ortholog mapping while preserving network topology and species structure. This tests whether the observed gene-to-gene correspondence produces stronger co-expression conservation than random mappings.

clique_intensity_test(cliques, ...)

# Default S3 method
clique_intensity_test(
  cliques,
  target_species,
  networks,
  orthologs,
  species_pairs = NULL,
  n_perm = 500L,
  alternative = c("greater", "less"),
  alpha = 0.05,
  min_species = length(target_species),
  max_genes_per_sp = 10L,
  edge_type = "conserved",
  n_cores = 1L,
  seed = NULL,
  cost_weights = c(q = 1, effect = 0),
  ...
)

Arguments

cliques

Output from find_cliques.

...

Additional arguments passed to the default method.

target_species

Character vector of target species names.

networks

Named list of network objects (each with $network matrix and $threshold scalar).

orthologs

Ortholog table data frame with columns Species1, Species2, hog.

species_pairs

Optional list of length-2 character vectors specifying which pairs to compare. Defaults to all pairwise combinations of target_species.

n_perm

Number of permutations (default 500).

alternative

Direction of test: "greater" (default) tests whether observed intensity exceeds the null; "less" tests whether it is below the null.

alpha

Significance threshold (default 0.05).

min_species

Minimum species per clique.

max_genes_per_sp

Maximum genes per species per HOG.

edge_type

Edge type filter.

n_cores

Number of parallel cores.

seed

Random seed for reproducibility.

cost_weights

Cost weights for find_cliques.

Value

Data frame with columns:

clique_idx

1-based index into baseline cliques

hog

HOG identifier

observed_intensity

Intensity from baseline cliques

null_mean

Mean intensity over matched permutations

null_sd

SD of intensity over matched permutations

z_score

(observed - null_mean) / null_sd

p_value

Empirical one-sided p-value over matched permutations (direction determined by alternative)

n_perm

Total number of permutations run

n_matched

Number of permutations where clique had a matching HOG with Jaccard > 0

Details

P-values are empirical over matched permutations only (permutations where the clique's HOG produced a clique with Jaccard > 0 to the baseline). Unmatched permutations are excluded, not counted as zeros.

Contents
